text.title: continuous-discovery-habits Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for continuous-discovery-habits as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: "Weekly interview" degrades to "weekly chat with the loudest customer" — PMs over-sample the same 5 power users.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents must enforce sampling diversity (segment, recency, churn-status, plan-tier) before each round. Without this, the OST reflects power-user preferences, not market-wide patterns.

failure-mode.description: OST grows monotonically; without pruning, it becomes a dumping ground. By month 6 most trees have 200+ nodes and become unusable.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Need a quarterly archive-or-promote ritual. Monthly pruning keeps the tree navigable and forces teams to drop invalidated hypotheses.

failure-mode.description: Opportunities get conflated with solutions ("opportunity: build dashboard"). Must reject solution-shaped opportunities; they belong as branches under a real opportunity.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Solution-shaped opportunities collapse the distinction between need and proposed answer, preventing the team from validating the underlying problem.

failure-mode.description: Discovery-delivery balance (15–20% capacity) is fictional in most teams — engineers stay at 100% delivery, PM does discovery alone, trio collapses to PM-only.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Discovery-delivery percentage is a contract with engineering, not a PM aspiration. If 15% gets eaten weekly, escalate or shrink scope; do not silently absorb it.

failure-mode.description: Outcome metric ambiguity — many PMs pick activation/retention proxies that the team can't actually move in a quarter. Agent-driven OST inherits the bad outcome and produces noise.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin the outcome_id. New wording = new outcome = new tree. Outcome metrics must be directly movable by the team in a quarter, not proxy metrics that conflate causation.

failure-mode.description: Past-behavior interviews still surface aspirational answers when the prompt is loose; LLM transcript-coding amplifies this, mistaking interviewer leading questions for customer signal.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Interview-prep must produce questions about specific recent instances ("tell me about the last time you..."), never future predictions. Coder must label every quote as past_behavior | preference | speculation; synthesizer must filter to past_behavior only.

failure-mode.description: Synthesis collapses when interview corpora cross > 100 transcripts without theming — naive embedding-based clustering returns shallow themes ("users want speed"). Hierarchical theming (axial coding) is needed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require N>=5 quotes from >=3 participants before emitting a theme. Do not manufacture cross-cutting themes from N=2 unrelated quotes.

failure-mode.description: Tree visualization tools (Miro/FigJam) become the bottleneck — a YAML/JSON tree-as-code is more agent-friendly but humans don't love it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin OST as YAML; use mermaid-cli or graphviz to render SVG for stakeholder meetings. Agents are fast on code; don't force them to manipulate design tools.

failure-mode.description: Memory creep across weeks: agents fed last-week's "decisions" treat them as immutable, blocking re-litigation. Always include a revisited_ok: true flag in the prompt for opportunities older than 30 days.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Opportunities should be revisitable; otherwise the team locks in bad assumptions. Explicit revisit flags let teams re-negotiate old decisions when new evidence arrives.

failure-mode.description: Calendar contention: agents auto-book interviews into PM's deep-work blocks; require a "discovery zone" calendar block as the only legal slot.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Interview scheduling must respect PM's focus time. A "discovery zone" block signals availability and prevents agent-driven interview scheduling from disrupting the week.

failure-mode.description: Customer recordings often contain SSN, contract terms, internal company info. Run a PII scrubber pre-coding; never feed raw recordings to a remote LLM without redaction.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PII scrubbing is a mandatory gating step before agent ingestion. Compliance and privacy require local redaction before any remote processing.
